arts.ttl: Napoli set sight on Manchester United defender
arts.sum: With Antonio Conte eager to add more Premier League players to his side, Napoli are...

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford shows true Man United colours after latest Ruben Amorim decision
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been spotted at Old Trafford for Manchester United vs Bournemouth despite being dropped again by Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Manchester United considering lucrative post-season trip to Malaysia
arts.sum: United are in talks about heading to Malaysia after this season concludes.

arts.ttl: Man United 'tracking two goalkeepers' to provide competition to Andre Onana
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly tracking Leeds United goalkeeper Illan Meslier as one of two goalkeeper targets.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford is spotted for the first time since he was ruthlessly axed from Manchester United's squad by Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Rather than watch from home, as he did for the derby and for the Tottenham game, Rashford was spotted at Old Trafford to watch his team-mates face Bournemouth on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'annoyed' Manchester United teammates after Man City win with transfer admission
arts.sum: Manchester United had little advance notice of the interview Marcus Rashford gave on a visit to Button Lane Primary School days after being dropped for the Manchester derby

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford’s Man United journey nearing ‘inevitable ending’ – Gary Neville
arts.sum: Rashford was left out of the matchday squad for the third straight game on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford has become a 'distraction' and needs to leave Manchester United in January, believes Gary Neville... as he backs Ruben Amorim over handling of axed striker
arts.sum: Gary Neville has claimed that Marcus Rashford needs to leave Manchester United in January and labelled him a 'distraction'. Rashford has been frozen out under Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: 'I could see' - Ruben Amorim gives exciting answer about his Manchester United rebuild
arts.sum: Man Utd play Bournemouth in the Premier League on Sunday and Ruben Amorim spoke ahead of the game.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains Marcus Rashford's extended Man Utd exile against Bournemouth
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford was left out of Man Utd's squad for a third consecutive match on Sunday.
